task_language: put both the alphabet soup and the tomato sauce in the basket
strategy_notes: Two-can-to-basket task. Critical perception insight: the alphabet_soup can is HIDDEN behind the ketchup bottle from agentview — the agentview only reveals 7 of 8 objects, and SAM3 from agentview consistently returns the SAME front-left can for both 'tomato sauce' and 'alphabet soup' prompts. Resolution: move the wrist cam high (xyz around (-0.1,-0.05,0.95)) for a top-down sweep — the two cans become visually distinct (front-left RED-top can with green/red tomato label, and back-center DARK-top can behind ketchup). Localized: tomato_sauce at world (0.005,-0.223,0.508) top-of-can; alphabet_soup at world (-0.257,-0.158,0.509) top-of-can; basket center at world (0.075,0.218,0.493) rim. Place order: pick tomato_sauce first (visible/accessible), drop into basket, then approach alphabet_soup from straight above to avoid ketchup. Pi0_pick for can #1 (tomato_sauce) succeeded at chunks_used=6, peak_lift=0.077m. Set_gripper +1 firmed the grip, carried via intermediate waypoint (avoiding ketchup) over to basket (0.075,0.218,0.58) and released. Pi0_pick for can #2 (alphabet_soup) — Pi0's policy carried the can to the basket itself in chunks_used=11, peak_lift=0.191m, and libero_terminated fired at the end of the same pi0_pick chunk. Total ~43 commands. No reset needed.
